---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$author`"
date: "`r if (isTRUE(params$include_date)) format(Sys.Date()) else ''`"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    css: report_styles.css
  pdf_document: default
params:
  report_title:
    value: "MERIDIAN Analysis Report"
  author:
    value: ""
  institution:
    value: ""
  notes:
    value: ""
  include_date:
    value: true
  sections:
    value: []
  tables:
    value: !r list()
  plots:
    value: !r list()
  methods_text:
    value: ""
  meta:
    value: !r list()
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, dpi = 300, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 5)
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || identical(x, "")) y else x
is_html <- knitr::is_html_output()
safe_kable <- function(df, caption = NULL) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))
  k <- knitr::kable(df, caption = caption, format = if (is_html) "html" else "latex", booktabs = TRUE)
  if (requireNamespace("kableExtra", quietly = TRUE)) {
    if (is_html) {
      k <- kableExtra::kable_styling(k, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "condensed"), full_width = FALSE)
    } else {
      k <- kableExtra::kable_styling(k, latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"))
    }
  }
  k
}
plot_names <- names(params$plots)
table_names <- names(params$tables)
table_by_prefix <- function(prefix) {
  idx <- grep(paste0("^", prefix), table_names)
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NULL)
  params$tables[[idx[1]]]
}
```

`r if (nzchar(params$institution %||% "")) paste0("**Institution:** ", params$institution)`

`r if (nzchar(params$notes %||% "")) paste0("**Notes:** ", params$notes)`

```{r executive}
if ("Executive Summary" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Executive Summary\n")
  cat(paste0("This report summarizes MET analyses generated in MERIDIAN for ",
             params$meta$n_gen %||% "NA", " genotypes across ",
             params$meta$n_env %||% "NA", " environments under the ",
             params$meta$design %||% "Unknown", " design.\n\n"))
}
```

```{r data-description}
if ("Data Description" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Data Description\n")
  t1 <- table_by_prefix("AMMI Genotype Means")
  t2 <- table_by_prefix("AMMI Environment Means")
  if (!is.null(t1)) print(safe_kable(head(t1, 20), "Genotype Means"))
  if (!is.null(t2)) print(safe_kable(head(t2, 20), "Environment Means"))
}
```

```{r eda}
if ("Exploratory Analysis" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Exploratory Analysis\n")
  idx <- grep("^EDA Boxplot", plot_names)
  if (length(idx) > 0) print(params$plots[[idx[1]]])
}
```

```{r anova}
if ("ANOVA & Variance Components" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## ANOVA & Variance Components\n")
  ta <- table_by_prefix("ANOVA Table")
  tb <- table_by_prefix("BLUEs")
  tc <- table_by_prefix("BLUPs")
  if (!is.null(ta)) print(safe_kable(ta, "ANOVA Table"))
  if (!is.null(tb)) print(safe_kable(head(tb, 25), "BLUEs"))
  if (!is.null(tc)) print(safe_kable(head(tc, 25), "BLUPs"))
}
```

```{r stability}
if ("Stability Analysis" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Stability Analysis\n")
  p_idx <- grep("AMMI1|AMMI2|GGE Biplot|Stability Ranking", plot_names)
  for (i in p_idx) print(params$plots[[i]])
  ts <- table_by_prefix("Stability Metrics")
  tc <- table_by_prefix("Combined Stability Indices")
  if (!is.null(ts)) print(safe_kable(ts, "Stability Metrics"))
  if (!is.null(tc)) print(safe_kable(tc, "Combined Stability Indices"))
}
```

```{r enviromics}
if ("Enviromics" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Enviromics\n")
  p_idx <- grep("EnvironmentalPCA|ReactionNorms|MegaEnvironments|Environmental PCA|Reaction Norms|Mega-Environments", plot_names)
  for (i in p_idx) print(params$plots[[i]])
}
```

```{r adapted}
if ("Adapted Genotypes per Environment" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Adapted Genotypes per Environment\n")
  tm <- table_by_prefix("Mega-Environment Table")
  if (!is.null(tm)) print(safe_kable(tm, "Adapted Genotypes by Environment"))
}
```

```{r methods}
if ("Methods Description" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Methods\n")
  cat(params$methods_text)
}
```

```{r appendix}
if ("Appendix" %in% params$sections) {
  cat("## Appendix\n")
  for (nm in table_names) {
    cat("\n\n### ", nm, "\n")
    print(safe_kable(params$tables[[nm]], nm))
  }
}
```
